summary: Integrate queue command decomposition preserves queue behavior while reducing integrate-queue.command.ts below the hotspot threshold.
findings: Extracted lane rendering/stale checks/recovery/normalization and doctor diagnostics into focused modules. Focused integrate queue and PR integration tests passed, plus typecheck, lint, format, and hotspot check.
residual_risks: Behavioral risk is concentrated in queue state transitions; covered by focused queue recovery and PR integration tests, with hosted CI still required before merge.
